Scope.TenantHint: Manage tenant-wide defaults, organizations, and inherited configuration.

Organization.RegistryTenantHelp: Tenant scope shows every organization in the tenant. Pick a row to open its details workspace.
Organization.RegistryOrganizationHelp: Organization scope is narrowed to the current organization so you can review its details in place.
Organization.EmptyStateDescription: There is no organization in the current scope yet. Add one from tenant scope or switch to an organization context first.
Organization.LogoPreviewHint: Preview and maintain the current organization avatar.
Organization.ScopeRulesTenant: Tenant scope can inspect every organization and maintain every setting available on this page.
Organization.ScopeRulesOrganization: Organization scope is restricted to the current organization. Governance switches remain read-only here.
Organization.InvitesAllowedHelp: Allow this organization to accept and manage invitation links.
Organization.GovernanceReadonlyHint: Tenant-governed fields remain locked in organization scope.
Organization.DefaultHelp: Tenant scope decides which organization becomes the default entry point for new sessions.
Organization.ActiveHelp: Disable access to freeze the organization without deleting its record.
Organization.NoTags: No tags are attached to this organization yet.
Organization.TagContextHelp: This panel surfaces the tags currently attached to the selected organization. Tag governance can stay on its dedicated workflow if needed.
Organization.GitHubSourceHelp: Use the maintained GitHub demo source.
Organization.AliyunSourceHelp: Use the mirrored Aliyun OSS source.
Organization.ReadonlyActionHint: You need edit permission to run demo generation.
Organization.SelectPromptDescription: Select a row from the registry above to open the details workspace.
Organization.MembersHint: Manage active membership, default organization, and organization-level access for users in this organization.
Organization.NoMembers: No members in this organization yet.

Role.NoRolesHint: Create a role to start configuring role-based access for your organization.
Role.NoRoleSelectedHint: Choose a role from the list to review permissions, rename it, or manage its access scope.
Role.SystemRoleHint: System roles are managed by the platform and cannot be deleted.
Role.CustomRoleHint: Custom roles can be renamed and deleted when no assignments depend on them.

Users.GroupsHint: Manage which groups the user belongs to in each active organization.
Users.NoActiveOrganizations: This user is not active in any organization.
Users.NoMoreOrganizations: No more organizations can be added
Users.InviteOrganizationHint: Invitations are sent in the current organization scope.
Users.NoInviteOrganization: Switch to an organization scope before sending invites.

Invite.EmptyDescription: Create an invitation from organization scope to get started.
Invite.ResendMissingData: The selected invite is missing required resend data.

USERS_PAGE.ConfirmDeleteInvite: Are you sure you want to cancel this invite?

ORGANIZATIONS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Confirm to delete the org from server?

Onboarding.FeatureCategoryDesc_ai: Features related to AI, including workflows, digital expert agents, knowledge bases, project spaces, etc.
Onboarding.FeatureCategoryDesc_bi: Features related to BI data analysis, including semantic models, indicators, story dashboards, etc.
Onboarding.ConfigureAiModelDesc: Set up your primary AI provider and choose a default model for the AI copilot. You can continue refining it later in settings.
Onboarding.ConfigureAiModelTitle: Make your AI copilot ready to use
Onboarding.ConfigureAiModelHint: We will create your primary provider first, then you can add credentials and pick the default model in one place.

Chat.NoPublishedXpert: No published digital experts. Please create one in the workspace and click "Publish" to publish it

ClawXpert.Title: ClawXpert
ClawXpert.OrganizationRequired: Select an organization to use ClawXpert
ClawXpert.OrganizationRequiredDesc: ClawXpert stores one assistant binding per user and per organization.
ClawXpert.LoadFailedDesc: Check your assistant access and try again.
ClawXpert.WizardTitle: Choose the published Xpert to use as the agent for your ClawXpert.
ClawXpert.WizardDesc: This page only needs one binding. You can change it later at any time.
ClawXpert.BindingUnavailable: Your previous ClawXpert binding is no longer available. Please select another assistant.
ClawXpert.NoAssistants: No published assistants are available yet
ClawXpert.NoAssistantsDesc: Create a new ClawXpert here, or publish an existing Xpert and bind it here later.
ClawXpert.SearchPlaceholder: Search your available assistants by title, name, slug, or id
ClawXpert.NoMatches: No assistants match your current search.
ClawXpert.SaveFailed: Failed to save the ClawXpert binding.
ClawXpert.DeleteFailed: Failed to clear the ClawXpert binding.
ClawXpert.PublishFailed: Failed to publish the current ClawXpert xpert.
ClawXpert.FrameMissing: CHATKIT_FRAME_URL is not configured for ClawXpert.
ClawXpert.NoDescription: This assistant does not have a public description yet.
ClawXpert.OverviewEmptyDesc: Bind one published Xpert first. Once ready, this panel becomes the overview and entry point for your ClawXpert workspace.
ClawXpert.OverviewReadyDesc: Use the markdown workspace to maintain SOUL.md and USER.md for this ClawXpert binding.
ClawXpert.CopilotModelDesc: Switch the model used by the bound ClawXpert xpert without leaving this page.
ClawXpert.BehaviorEditorDesc: The assistant's name, personality, and identity definition
ClawXpert.LongformPlaceholderDesc: Richer behavior documents, expanded policy notes, and additional source materials will be connected here in a follow-up iteration.
ClawXpert.UserProfileEditorDesc: User preferences, communication style, and long-term memory
ClawXpert.UserProfilePlaceholderDesc: This tab is reserved for thread-aware user profile signals and preference snapshots once the supporting model is available.
ClawXpert.DocsPanelDesc: Keep SOUL.md and USER.md as editable markdown documents scoped to the current ClawXpert binding.
ClawXpert.PreferenceStorageHint: SOUL.md and USER.md are stored on the current AssistantBinding user preference record.
ClawXpert.EditorOrganizationRequiredDesc: Select an organization and finish the ClawXpert setup before editing SOUL.md and USER.md.
ClawXpert.EditorBindingRequiredDesc: Once a ClawXpert binding is created, this editor will load SOUL.md and USER.md.
ClawXpert.EditorUnavailableDesc: The shell must be in the ready state before these thread-adjacent markdown documents can be edited.
ClawXpert.PreferenceSaveFailed: Failed to save the ClawXpert markdown documents.
ClawXpert.TriggerDraftLoadFailedDesc: The bound xpert trigger draft could not be loaded. Check your access and try again.
ClawXpert.NoTriggerCardsDesc: Use Add trigger to add a non-chat trigger to the bound xpert draft.
ClawXpert.TriggerConfigDesc: Adjust each trigger on the bound xpert draft here. Saving updates the draft only and still requires publish before runtime changes take effect.
ClawXpert.TriggerDraftHint: These edits update the current xpert draft only. Publish the xpert later if you want the trigger runtime configuration to change.
ClawXpert.TriggerDraftSaveFailed: Failed to save the ClawXpert trigger draft.
ClawXpert.TriggerDraftAgentMissing: Unable to save the trigger draft because the primary agent node could not be resolved.
ClawXpert.TriggerOrganizationRequiredDesc: Select an organization and finish the ClawXpert setup before editing draft trigger configuration.
ClawXpert.TriggerBindingRequiredDesc: Once a ClawXpert binding is ready, this panel will load the bound xpert trigger draft.
ClawXpert.TriggerEditorUnavailableTitle: Trigger draft editor is temporarily unavailable
ClawXpert.TriggerEditorUnavailableDesc: The ClawXpert shell must be in the ready state before trigger draft configuration can be edited.
ClawXpert.TriggerNoExtraConfig: No additional configuration is available for this trigger here.
ClawXpert.LowerPlaceholderOverviewDesc: The lower-right area stays as a placeholder for the next batch of ClawXpert workspace capabilities.
ClawXpert.LowerPlaceholderDetailDesc: Thread-specific inspector panels are still placeholders so the right-side ChatKit conversation remains the main live session surface.
ClawXpert.DetailEditorDesc: This thread-scoped view keeps the same markdown workspace while showing the currently active ChatKit thread context.
ClawXpert.AgentProfilePlaceholderDesc: Model presets, runtime traits, and deeper agent metadata will be surfaced here after the profile payload is ready.
ClawXpert.FilesPlaceholderDesc: Thread attachments, reusable source files, and searchable knowledge artifacts will appear here in a later milestone.
ClawXpert.ConversationStatsDesc: Daily message volume between you and this assistant over the last 12 weeks.
ClawXpert.NoMessageActivity: No message activity yet. Start a conversation to populate this heatmap.
ClawXpert.ScheduledTasksDesc: Recent tasks tied to the currently bound Xpert.
ClawXpert.NoScheduledTasksHint: No scheduled tasks yet. You can create one from a conversation.
ClawXpert.NoTasksDesc: Once this Xpert has task schedules, the latest task summaries will appear here.
ClawXpert.FeishuPlaceholderCardDesc: The layout is reserved, but no real Feishu channel model is connected yet.
ClawXpert.FeishuPlaceholderFootnote: Editable channel rules, delivery status, and sync controls will be added after the backing configuration becomes available.
ClawXpert.ThreadDetailDesc: This lightweight detail panel follows the current ChatKit thread and summarizes the active ClawXpert context.
ClawXpert.SetupFirstDesc: Complete the binding in the ClawXpert overview before opening the conversation detail view.
ClawXpert.ThreadDetailUnavailableTitle: Thread detail is waiting for the shell to be ready
ClawXpert.ThreadDetailUnavailableDesc: If organization selection, binding setup, or runtime loading is incomplete, this left panel stays in placeholder mode while the right-side shell continues handling the real state machine.
ClawXpert.ThreadTimelineDesc: A richer session timeline, milestone list, and left-side inspector view will plug into this area later.
ClawXpert.ThreadArtifactsDesc: Thread-linked files, generated artifacts, and structured outputs can be connected here when the thread inspector expands.
ClawXpert.ThreadNotesDesc: Thread summaries, operator notes, and extra context snippets are intentionally left as placeholders for now.

Assistant.SettingsDesc: Manage tenant defaults and organization overrides for assistants used across chat experiences.
Assistant.FloatingHint: Drag the launcher to dock left or right.
Assistant.TenantDefaultDesc: Applies when no organization-level override exists. Only super admins can edit this area.
Assistant.TenantPageDesc: Configure tenant-level default assistants and Xperts that organizations inherit by default.
Assistant.TenantPermissionRequired: Only super admins can edit tenant default assistant settings.
Assistant.AssistantIdPlaceholder: Search accessible Xperts by name or ID
Assistant.RuntimeFrameUrlDesc: ChatKit frame is deployment-configured and shared by all assistant pages.
Assistant.RuntimeJwtDesc: Authentication uses the current user JWT automatically.
Assistant.OrganizationOverrideDesc: Override the tenant default for the currently selected organization. Reset to inherit the tenant configuration again.
Assistant.OrganizationPageDesc: Configure organization-level assistant routing overrides. Unconfigured assistants continue inheriting tenant defaults.
Assistant.OrganizationRequired: Select an organization to manage organization-level overrides.
Assistant.NoSavedConfigInScope: No saved configuration in this scope
Assistant.ResetOrganizationFailed: Failed to reset organization assistant configuration.
Assistant.DisabledDesc: This assistant is configured but currently disabled for the active organization.
Assistant.MissingDesc: Configure this assistant in Settings / Assistants before starting a conversation here.
Assistant.ErrorDesc: Check the assistant configuration and try again from the common chat page.

ChatCommon.Label: Common Assistant
ChatCommon.Description: Embedded assistant used by the common chat page.

XpertShared.Label: Workspace Assistant
XpertShared.Description: Shared assistant used in the Xpert workspace and studio shell.

ChatBI.Label: ChatBI Assistant
ChatBI.Description: Embedded assistant used by the ChatBI page.

ClawXpert.Description: Embedded assistant experience for the ClawXpert page.

Workflow.RequiredTriggerConfig: Complete the required trigger configuration before continuing.

PERMISSIONS.ONLY_ADMIN: These permissions are read-only and enabled only for admin
PERMISSIONS.INSUFFICIENT: You do not have sufficient permissions. The following permissions are missing:

Organization.DataNetworkDescription: The server will download the corresponding data files from this network storage for the import of demonstration data.

ChatBI.NoSemanticModelsAvailable: No semantic models available, please create a semantic model first
ChatBI.NoEntitiesAvailable: No entities available, please add an entity first
ChatBI.Caption: Caption

Xpert.StartFromHelp: Choose a blank starter or load a template first. You can keep editing the rest of the wizard before creating the Xpert.
Xpert.BlankStartHelp: Start from the default blank wizard and choose triggers, middlewares, and skills yourself.
Xpert.TemplateStartHelp: Select an agent template, preload the wizard from its draft, and keep tailoring the result before creating.
Xpert.WorkflowStartFromHelp: Workflow templates are not available in this starter yet, so you can begin with the blank workflow setup for now.
Xpert.WorkflowBlankStartHelp: Start with the default chat-trigger workflow scaffold and choose the action and transform nodes you want.
Xpert.WorkflowTemplateStartHelp: Workflow template starters will be supported in a later iteration of the shared wizard.
Xpert.KnowledgeStartFromHelp: Choose a blank pipeline or start from a knowledge template, then keep editing triggers and stages before creating.
Xpert.KnowledgeBlankStartHelp: Start from the default knowledge pipeline wizard and choose the trigger, source, processor, chunker, and understanding stages yourself.
Xpert.KnowledgeTemplateStartHelp: Select a knowledge pipeline template, prefill the wizard from its draft, and continue customizing the pipeline stages.
Xpert.WorkflowActionNodesHelp: Choose the starter action nodes to place after the default Chat Trigger. We will connect them in a left-to-right workflow for you.
Xpert.WorkflowTransformNodesHelp: Choose the transform and response nodes to append after the action stage. The selected nodes will keep the fixed starter order.
Xpert.WorkflowChatTriggerIncluded: Always included as the first node in this starter workflow.
Xpert.SelectTriggerProviders: Choose the triggers you want to prepare now. You can skip this and configure details later in Studio.
Xpert.SelectKnowledgeTriggers: Choose the triggers for this knowledge pipeline. You can skip this step and add more later in Studio.
Xpert.SelectDataSources: Choose the data source providers to seed this knowledge pipeline. You can adjust their configuration later in Studio.
Xpert.SelectProcessors: Choose the processors to run after the data source step. Detailed configuration stays in Studio.
Xpert.SelectChunkers: Choose the chunkers to split processed content before it reaches the knowledge base.
Xpert.SelectImageUnderstandings: Choose the image understanding providers if this pipeline needs OCR or visual extraction. You can skip this step.
Xpert.AddWorkspaceSkillsHelp: Select installed workspace skills for the primary agent. If you need more, open the install dialog and add them to this workspace first.
Xpert.AddSkillsPlaceholder: Add placeholder skills for this blank expert. The corresponding skill nodes will be created now, and you can refine them later in Studio.
Xpert.AddSkillNames: Enter a skill name, then press Enter or comma
Xpert.WorkspaceRequiredForSkillInstall: Select a workspace first before installing or selecting skills for this Xpert.
Xpert.InstallWorkspaceSkillsDialogDesc: Browse repositories, pick a skill, and install it into the current workspace.
Xpert.NoWorkspaceSkillsAvailableDesc: No workspace skills installed yet. Use the install dialog to add a skill, then select it here.
Xpert.SelectMiddlewares: Choose the middlewares to preload for the primary agent. Detailed configuration stays in Studio.
Xpert.PreconfigurationNotSaved: Expert created, but the preconfiguration could not be saved. You can continue in Studio.
Xpert.KnowledgeBaseStepDescription: A Knowledge Base node will be created automatically as the final stage of this pipeline. You can complete its detailed settings after entering Studio.
Xpert.KnowledgeBaseNodeWillBeCreated: The node is added by default so the new knowledge pipeline has a complete output target.
Xpert.WorkspaceCreateAssistantHint: Describe the expert you want, and the assistant will create a draft and open Studio.
Xpert.StudioAssistantHint: Ask about the current draft, primary agent, or editing state.
Xpert.ImportOverwriteConfirm:
Importing this DSL will overwrite the current draft of this xpert. The published version will remain unchanged.

If the file contains memories, current memories will be cleared and replaced.
Xpert.ImportOverwriteSuccess: DSL imported into the current draft. Publish is still required for it to take effect.
Xpert.ImportMemoryIncomplete: The draft was imported, but memory replacement did not finish.
Xpert.ImportTypeMismatch: DSL type does not match the current xpert
Xpert.ImportPrimaryAgentMissing: Primary agent not found in the DSL file
Xpert.ImportCurrentPrimaryAgentMissing: Current xpert primary agent not found

UserGroup.Title: User Groups
UserGroup.Subtitle: Manage organization-level access groups for published assistants.
UserGroup.AuthorizationByOrganizationHint: Tenant xperts are authorized per organization. Choose one organization, then configure which of its groups can access this xpert.
UserGroup.FormHint: Bind organization users into a reusable access group.
UserGroup.DescriptionPlaceholder: Describe who should belong to this group
UserGroup.MembersHint: Only active users in the current organization can be selected.
UserGroup.SelectedGroupsHint: Choose which organization groups are allowed to access this xpert after publication.
UserGroup.RuntimeAccessHint: Published xperts can only be used by members of the selected organization groups.
UserGroup.AccessRuleHint: If no group is selected, this published xpert will be blocked for organization users at runtime.
UserGroup.EmptySelectionHint: Select one or more groups from the right panel to allow runtime access.
UserGroup.GroupPickerHint: Search and select the organization groups that should be allowed to use this xpert.
UserGroup.EmptyGroupsHint: Create organization groups first, then return here to bind them to this xpert.
UserGroup.RemoveInactiveMembersHint: Remove inactive members from this group before saving.
UserGroup.SelectMembersHint: Select members from the right panel to add them to this group.
UserGroup.NoActiveMembersHint: Invite or activate users in the current organization, then assign them here.
UserGroup.NoGroupsInOrganization: No groups available in the current organization.
UserGroup.DeleteConfirmDetail: Deleting this group will remove member bindings and assistant authorization assignments. Continue?
UserGroup.XpertAuthorizationHint: Choose which published xperts this group can access.
UserGroup.NoPublishedXperts: No published xperts available for authorization.
UserGroup.SelectOrganizationFirstHint: Select an organization first to configure which groups can access this xpert.
UserGroup.NoOrganizationsAvailableHint: You need access to at least one organization before you can bind organization groups to this tenant xpert.

Certification.EmptyHint: Define reusable certification types for projects, assets, or review workflows.
Certification.DescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this certification type validates or represents

FEATURE_COPILOT_KNOWLEDGEBASE.Name: AI Knowledgebase
FEATURE_COPILOT_KNOWLEDGEBASE.Description: Efficiently store, retrieve, and generate knowledge content related to specific domains.

FEATURE_COPILOT_CHAT.Name: Chat AI
FEATURE_COPILOT_CHAT.Description: A conversational interface for interacting with intelligent assistants, digital experts, and toolsets.

FEATURE_COPILOT_CHATBI.Name: Chat BI
FEATURE_COPILOT_CHATBI.Description: A conversational interface that enables data querying, analysis, and visualization through natural language interaction.

FEATURE_XPERT.Name: Digital Expert
FEATURE_XPERT.Description: A virtual assistant that leverages artificial intelligence to provide personalized, real-time, and precise consulting, analysis, and decision support.

FEATURE_XPERT_CHATBI.Name: ChatBI
FEATURE_XPERT_CHATBI.Description: Show the ChatBI entry in the chat sidebar.

FEATURE_XPERT_CODEXPERT.Name: CodeXpert
FEATURE_XPERT_CODEXPERT.Description: Show the CodeXpert entry in the chat sidebar.

FEATURE_XPERT_DEEP_RESEARCH.Name: DeepResearch
FEATURE_XPERT_DEEP_RESEARCH.Description: Show the DeepResearch entry in the chat sidebar.
